title: Acinodendron traillii
intro:
There is no information on a plant called Acinodendron traillii. However, there is a plant called Acacia traillii, which is a synonym for Acacia dealbata, also known as Silver Wattle. Acacia dealbata is a plant species in the Fabaceae family.
